items_flat.title_en: Tencent Hy3 brings a 295B MoE model and a free API trial
items_flat.title_zh: 騰訊 Hy3 推出 295B MoE 模型與免費 API 試用
items_flat.summary_en: Hy3 arrived as a commercially friendly mixture-of-experts release with open deployment options and a two-week API trial.
items_flat.summary_zh: Hy3 以商用友善的混合專家模型形式推出，提供開放部署選項與兩週 API 試用。

items_flat.title_en: GPT-5.6 Sol deployment on Cerebras targets extreme inference speed
items_flat.title_zh: GPT-5.6 Sol 傳將部署 Cerebras，瞄準極高速推論
items_flat.summary_en: Pre-launch analysis described a Cerebras deployment targeting hundreds of tokens per second and a hardware-first serving design for the flagship model.
items_flat.summary_zh: 上市前分析描述 GPT-5.6 Sol 將採 Cerebras 部署，以每秒數百 token 與硬體優先的服務設計為目標。
